input.cameraPermissionMessage: Allow camera access to take photos in chat.
input.cameraErrorMessage: Could not open the camera. Check permissions.
input.voiceComingSoonMessage: Voice messages will be available soon.

attachment.photoPermissionMessage: Allow access to your photos to send images.
attachment.galleryErrorMessage: Could not open the gallery. Check permissions.

checkIn.notSignedInMessage: Please sign in to check in.
checkIn.alreadyMessage: You can only check in once every 24 hours at this location.
checkIn.tooFarMessage: You must be inside the venue to check in.
checkIn.unavailableMessage: Check-ins are not available right now.

incognito.title: Incognito Mode
incognito.subtitle: Enter this room without revealing your identity
incognito.hint: Others will only see this nickname — not your real name or photo.

service.subtitle: We'll receive your call and staff will come shortly.
service.errorCooldown: You just called. Wait a few minutes before calling again.
service.errorSend: Could not send the call. Try again.
service.successMessage: Your call was sent. Staff will be with you shortly.

password.title: This room is members-only
password.subtitle: Enter the room password to join the conversation.
password.errorNotConfigured: Service unavailable. Please try again later.
password.tooManyMinutes_one: Too many attempts. Try again in {{count}} minute.
password.tooManyMinutes_other: Too many attempts. Try again in {{count}} minutes.
password.tooManyGeneric: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
password.lockedFor: Too many failed attempts. Locked for {{minutes}} minutes.
password.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

employee.title: Add as Employee
employee.subtitle: Select a role for this team member.
employee.successNote: The invite is pending. The user will be notified and can accept or decline from their profile.
employee.errorPlanLimit: You have reached the maximum number of employees on your current plan.
employee.errorAlreadyExists: This user is already on your staff.
employee.errorNotConfigured: Service unavailable. Please try again later.
employee.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

userAction.requestSentMessage: This account is private. They will review your request.
userAction.personalMuteMessage: You will no longer see their messages.
userAction.reportSubmittedMessage: Our team will review this report.
userAction.blockMessage: They will be hidden from your view. This does not remove them from the room.
userAction.mutedInRoomFor: They have been muted in this room {{duration}}.
userAction.removeMessage: They will be removed from this room but can re-enter.
userAction.banMessage: They will be permanently removed from this room and cannot re-enter.

pin.unpinMessage: This will remove the pin for all users in this room.
pin.bannerA11yMultiple: {{count}} pinned messages — tap to see all
